violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the main entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the 4 door reach-in and 2 door slider shelving have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

Thermometers are lacking in the display unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

The door to the outside, located in the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
The wall in the chips/produce area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2023
